2026-06-02PSCorrections and Conditional Release ActReappointment of a part-time member of the Prairie Regional Division of the Parole Board of CanadaReappointment of Janelle R. Jackiw of Regina, Saskatchewan, as a part-time member of the Prairies Regional Division of the Parole Board of Canada, to hold office during good behaviour for a period of three years, effective June 15, 2026.N/A
subject: Reappointment of a part-time member of the Prairie Regional Division of the Parole Board of Canada
precis: Reappointment of Janelle R. Jackiw of Regina, Saskatchewan, as a part-time member of the Prairies Regional Division of the Parole Board of Canada, to hold office during good behaviour for a period of three years, effective June 15, 2026.
